KKR CEO Reveals Shah Rukh Khan’s Role in Andre Russell’s IPL Retirement

Dec 6, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

KKR CEO Reveals Shah Rukh Khan’s Role in Andre Russell’s IPL Retirement

Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) CEO Venky Mysore has revealed that releasing Andre Russell from the franchise was actually the suggestion of team owner and Bollywood superstar Shah Rukh Khan.

Russell announced his retirement from the Indian Premier League (IPL) on November 30 and will take up a new role with the franchise as its “Power Coach” for the 2026 season.

While stepping away from the IPL, Russell will continue playing in T20 leagues around the world, remaining closely associated with the Knight Riders group globally.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here: 👉 KKR CEO Reveals Shah Rukh Khan’s Role in Andre Russell’s IPL Retirement
